text:
Dragon Head.
According to mythology, when Demon was created, Lord Maha
Vishnu (The Saviour-Jagat Rakshaka) came forward and
destroyed the demon. Mercury is the emlxx:lying concept of Lord
Mahavishnu. Dragon Head stands for "Dhwaja Keerthi" (prestige
through flag). Therefore Mercury and Dragon Head are friends
and their combination either in conjunction or by appropriate aspect
brings name and fame to the Native. Venus is also friendly with
Mercury, because Mercury is female sometimes and Venus is also
female. Mercury takes the Gender of the planet it is posited with
in a sign.
Inimical Planets:
Intellect planet Mercury does not like egoistic Mars and
liberation Dragon Tail, which are discordant to their
characteristics. Ego and wisdom do not go together. This explains
why Mercury and Mars are enemies. Similarly Mercury is young
and it has no inclination towards salvation and is therefore inimical
to Dragon Tail.
JUPITER
Strictly speaking Jupiter is not inimical to any other planet.
